a: Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Drive, Google Docs, Sheets, Meet)

c.d: The features the app provides to facilitate collaboration, including communication, file sharing, task management, and project management capabilities.
How intuitive and user-friendly the app is for team members with varying technical skills.
The ability of the app to connect and work seamlessly with other tools and platforms commonly used by teams.
The app's capacity to accommodate the needs of growing teams and projects without compromising performance or usability.
The cost-effectiveness of the app, considering its features and the size of the team using it. Availability of free plans or trials.
